title: Obsidian develops a new Fallout after canceling Avowed sequel
summary: Multiple reports confirm that the New Vegas studio returns to the franchise while Microsoft scraps the Avowed 2 project.

title: Mario Kart Tour will permanently close in September 2025
summary: Nintendo will end the free-to-play mobile racing game service after years of updates.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced launches to positive reviews and gameplay guides
summary: The remake of the classic pirate game receives favorable reviews and extensive coverage of strategies and locations.

title: Microsoft continues Xbox layoffs as unions and politicians criticize management
summary: Multiple reports detail the impact of cuts on studios like Bethesda and id Software, as well as the reaction from unions and Senator Bernie Sanders.

title: Square Enix shuts down mobile game Final Fantasy 7 Ever Crisis
summary: The free-to-play game based on Final Fantasy 7 will soon become unavailable, joining the withdrawal of other titles from the company.

title: Over 220,000 players sign a petition for Sony not to abandon physical discs on PlayStation
summary: The community mobilizes against the possible elimination of the physical format, with support from figures like Solid Snake.

title: Destiny 2 fans create a game to throw tomatoes at former Bungie CEO
summary: The community mocks the studio's situation with a 'boss battler' where they attack Pete Parsons' car collection.

title: Bithell Games announces Vampirium 1997, an immersive sim where Dracula is king of England
summary: The studio behind Tron: Catalyst presents a stealth and vampire game in a historical alternate timeline.

title: MindsEye employees protest against a fan event organized by their own studio
summary: Workers demonstrate against a paid event as the studio undergoes multiple rounds of layoffs.

title: Persona 4 Revival will remove homophobic content, producer confirms
summary: The remake of the classic RPG will introduce changes to characters and scenes to remove offensive stereotypes.

title: Minecraft finally adds the ability to sit after 17 years
summary: The update allows characters to sit on different objects, a highly requested feature.

title: Palworld reaches player milestone before its 1.0 launch and won't raise its price
summary: The creature survival game continues to grow as it prepares for its definitive version.

title: Love and Deepspace's werewolf love interest could disappear permanently
summary: Controversy with the Chinese government ends one of the dating game's most popular characters.

title: Former Bungie director settles $200 million lawsuit with Sony
summary: The executive accused of sexual misconduct reaches a settlement and appears in the credits of Marathon.

title: Fallout series gets 10 Emmy nominations, but actors are excluded
summary: The Prime Video adaptation is recognized in technical categories, while the main performers receive no nominations.

title: Subnautica 2 adds the ability to stun fish in its first major update
summary: Players can now defend themselves against marine fauna without killing it in the latest major update.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker can be completed even before the prologue
summary: The vampire RPG surprises with a shorter length than originally estimated by developers.

title: GTA Trilogy remaster manager understands player anger after years of silence
summary: The studio admits the launch issues and says many players enjoyed the game despite everything.

title: Mortal Shell 2 confirms its release date for August 20
summary: The awaited soulslike announces its official arrival for this summer.

title: Buckshot Roulette arrives on Xbox Game Pass without notice
summary: The popular shotgun Russian roulette game is added to Microsoft's subscription service.
